drag-drop-lines-prompt: Drag and drop the lines to create the best poem.
select-poem-prompt: Select a poem to view details.
select-words-prompt_one: Select {{count}} words to compose your poem
select-words-prompt_other: Select {{count}} words to compose your poem
sign-in-hint: Sign in to save your stories to the cloud and replay them anywhere.
sign-in-to-save: Sign in to save your progress to the cloud
tutorial-bullet-alliteration: Alliteration — Pick 3+ words starting with the same letter
tutorial-bullet-rhyming: Rhyming Pair — Select words that rhyme with each other
tutorial-bullet-vocabulary: Literary Vocabulary — Use rare, sophisticated words
tutorial-char-color-hint: Words tinted this color appeal to {{name}}
tutorial-step0-content: You're about to write your first poem by selecting words from the pool. Each word you pick becomes part of your poem — the order you select them in is the order they'll appear.
tutorial-step0-tip: There's no wrong answer. Write what feels right to you.
tutorial-step1-content: Every word is subtly tinted with the color of the character who'd like it most. Pay attention to these hints — they'll guide you toward words that resonate with specific people.
tutorial-step1-tip: You don't have to please everyone. Targeting one character deeply can be more effective than trying to impress all three.
tutorial-step2-content: You can earn bonus points with poetic techniques:
tutorial-step2-tip: Bonuses apply to every character's score, so they're always worth pursuing.
